summary: The user sought recommendations for upbeat workout playlists suitable for high-intensity workouts and expressed interest in trying the "Beast Mode" playlist on Spotify. They also inquired about fitness influencers on Instagram who post HIIT workouts, ultimately deciding to start with Kayla Itsines' HIIT routines, specifically the "BBG HIIT Core Blast."
facts: The user usually has free time on Sundays for workouts. The user is interested in high-intensity workouts and has been following a fitness influencer on Instagram who posts HIIT workouts. The user plans to start with Kayla Itsines' HIIT workouts. The user expressed excitement about trying the "BBG HIIT Core Blast" workout. Kayla Itsines is known for her high-intensity workouts, including her Bikini Body Guides (BBG) and BBG Stronger programs. Kayla's HIIT workouts typically involve short, intense bursts of exercise followed by brief periods of rest. Kayla's workouts often incorporate strength training exercises to build muscle and increase overall fitness. Kayla provides modifications for beginners and progressions for more advanced fitness levels. The user is looking for workouts that target their core and legs.
